title: Vasteras Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Vasteras, with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vasteras are extreme, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 52% and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
